entities.name: LendingHistoryItem
entities.description: An item representing a lending history record in the Library application.

menus.name: LibraryMenu
menus.description: This is the default menu allowing to explore the Library SelfApplication.

definition.label: Toto
definition.content:
# List of Authors

This report displays a list of all authors in the system.s

reports.name: LendingHistoryItemDetails
reports.defaultLabel: Detailed information about a Lending History Item

definition.content:
# Welcome to the Library Application

You can browse the library or run the following actions:

storedQueries.name: BooksByAuthorCount
storedQueries.defaultLabel: The count of Books By Author.
storedQueries.description: This query produces a list of authors, with the count of Books for each author.

storedQueries.name: BookCountByPublisher
storedQueries.defaultLabel: The count of Books By Publisher.
storedQueries.description: This query produces a list of publishers, with the count of Books for each publisher.

storedQueries.name: AuthorsCountByCountry
storedQueries.defaultLabel: The count of Authors By Country.
storedQueries.description: This query produces a list of countries, with the count of Authors for each country.

storedQueries.name: BooksByCountryCount
storedQueries.defaultLabel: The count of Books By Country.
storedQueries.description: This query produces a list of countries, with the count of Books for each author.
